content.text: I'll start by inspecting the current state of the ingress-nginx controller and its configuration.

input.command: kubectl get pods -n ingress-nginx 2>&1; echo "---CONFIGMAP---"; kubectl get configmap -n ingress-nginx 2>&1; echo "---INGRESS---"; kubectl get ingress -n demo 2>&1; echo "---OTEL---"; kubectl get pods -n otel 2>&1

content.content:

---CONFIGMAP---

input.command: kubectl get configmap ingress-nginx-controller -n ingress-nginx -o yaml 2>&1; echo "===EXTRA==="; kubectl get configmap ingress-nginx-controller-extra -n ingress-nginx -o yaml 2>&1

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
data:
  enable-opentelemetry: "true"
  limit-req-status-code: "429"
  log-format-upstream: $remote_addr - $remote_user [$time_local] "$request" $status
    $body_bytes_sent "$http_referer" "$http_user_agent" otel_trace_id=$opentelemetry_trace_id
    otel_span_id=$opentelemetry_span_id
  opentelemetry-trust-incoming-span: "true"
  otel-sampler: AlwaysOn
  otel-sampler-parent-based: "false"
  otel-sampler-ratio: "1.0"
  otel-service-name: ingress-nginx
  otlp-collector-host: otel-collector.otel.svc
  otlp-collector-port: "4317"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"enable-opentelemetry":"true","log-format-upstream":"$remote_addr - $remote_user [$time_local] \"$request\" $status $body_bytes_sent \"$http_referer\" \"$http_user_agent\" otel_trace_id=$opentelemetry_trace_id otel_span_id=$opentelemetry_span_id","opentelemetry-trust-incoming-span":"true","otel-sampler":"AlwaysOn","otel-sampler-parent-based":"false","otel-sampler-ratio":"1.0","otel-service-name":"ingress-nginx","otlp-collector-host":"otel-collector.otel.svc","otlp-collector-port":"4317"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/component":"controller","app.kubernetes.io/instance":"ingress-nginx","app.kubernetes.io/name":"ingress-nginx","app.kubernetes.io/part-of":"ingress-nginx","app.kubernetes.io/version":"1.14.1"},"name":"ingress-nginx-controller","namespace":"ingress-nginx"}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T08:48:04Z"
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: controller
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: ingress-nginx
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ingress-nginx
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: ingress-nginx
    app.kubernetes.io/version: 1.14.1
  name: ingress-nginx-controller
  namespace: ingress-nginx
  resourceVersion: "284549"
  uid: 76cbab7b-2881-45ce-9e82-79e5fc7ca9e2
===EXTRA===

content.text: The main configmap already has the full OTel config. There's a decoy `-extra` configmap. Let me check which configmap the controller actually references and its runtime state.
